zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Haselwood於大約1503年出生在英國武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特時，她的父親Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison24歲，母親Jane Chauntrell23歲。她於1524年與Roger Wakeman在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1587年3月27日在英國武斯特斯爾享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Haselwood于大约1503年出生在英国武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特时，她的父亲Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison24岁，母亲Jane Chauntrell23岁。她于1524年与Roger Wakeman在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1587年3月27日在英国武斯特斯爾享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Haselwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hazelwood
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hazlewood (Suffolk, Surrey, Devon, Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Shropshire), named with Old English hæsel ‘hazel’ + wudu ‘wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Haselwood was born about 1503, in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, her father, Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison, was 24 and her mother, Jane Chauntrell, was 23. She married Roger Wakeman in 1524, in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 27 March 1587, in Worcestershire, England, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Haselwood est née environ 1503, à Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Jane Chauntrell, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Wakeman en 1524, à Drayton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1587, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Haselwood um 1503 in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison 24 und ihre Mutter Jane Chauntrell 23. Sie hat 1524 in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Roger Wakeman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. März 1587 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Haselwood è nata il circa 1503 nel Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Jane Chauntrell, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Roger Wakeman nel 1524, nel Drayton, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 27 marzo 1587, nel Worcestershire, England, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Haselwoodが約1503年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアチャッドエスリー コルベットで生まれた時，父Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prisonは24歳，母Jane Chauntrellは23歳であった。1524年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアドレイトンでRoger Wakemanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1587年3月27日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Haselwood(이)가 대략 1503년 영국 워스스터실르 채데슬리 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Chauntrell(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드라이턴에서 Roger Wakeman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1587년 3월 27일 영국 워스스터실르에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Haselwood nasceu aproximadamente 1503, em Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Jane Chauntrell, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Wakeman em 1524, em Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1587, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Haselwood родилась около 1503 г. в местности чэддесли корбетт, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Chauntrell, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Wakeman в 1524 г. в местности дреитон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 27 марта 1587 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Haselwood nació aproximadamente 1503, en Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Jane Chauntrell, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Roger Wakeman en 1524, en Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1587, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 85 años.
